dashboard.faq.title: Help Center
dashboard.faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about the dashboard.
dashboard.faq.q1: How do I change the display theme?
dashboard.faq.a1: You can change the theme through the settings in the System Settings > General menu. Available themes are: Light, Dark, and Automatic (follows the operating system).
dashboard.faq.q2: What do the color indicators on the status badges mean?
dashboard.faq.a2: Green means Completed, Blue means Shipped, Yellow means Processed, and Red means Failed or Cancelled. You can hover over the badge to see details.
dashboard.faq.q3: How do I export report data?
dashboard.faq.a3: Visit the Reports menu, select the desired date range and filters, then click the Export button located at the top of the table. Supported formats: PDF, Excel, and CSV.
dashboard.skeleton.title: Demo Loading State

dashboard.skeleton.empty_title: Click the button to see the demo
dashboard.skeleton.empty_desc: The skeleton will display a loading animation that usually appears while waiting for data from the server.
